Interface ReaderWriter

All Known Implementing Classes:
ConsoleFileManager, ConsoleManager
public interface ReaderWriter
Interface for basic input/output operations. Provides methods for reading various data types and writing text.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Scanner
    getScanner()
    Returns the scanner used for reading input.
    Double
    readDouble()
    Reads a double value from input.
    Integer
    readInt()
    Reads an integer value from input.
    String
    readLine()
    Reads a line of text from input.
    Long
    readLong()
    Reads a long value from input.
    void
    write(String text)
    Writes the specified text to output.

  • Method Details

    • getScanner

      Scanner getScanner()
      Returns the scanner used for reading input.
      Returns:
      the Scanner instance

    • readInt

      Integer readInt()
      Reads an integer value from input.
      Returns:
      the read Integer, or null if input is invalid

    • readLong

      Long readLong()
      Reads a long value from input.
      Returns:
      the read Long, or null if input is invalid

    • readDouble

      Double readDouble()
      Reads a double value from input.
      Returns:
      the read Double, or null if input is invalid

    • readLine

      String readLine()
      Reads a line of text from input.
      Returns:
      the read line as a String

    • write

      void write(String text)
      Writes the specified text to output.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to be written
